acceptance_note: APPROVE_WITH_EXCEPTIONS for VS3 continuation only. Current local CLI/report/operator UX evidence is acceptable for continued VS3 work. Before final product release, VS3-P, real on-prem readiness, or any human operator acceptance claim, a final operator UX/trust review must verify that users can understand action status, connector mode, approval requirement, policy decisions, denial reasons, evidence/audit links, risks, and next steps without misleading guidance.
issue_list: No final human operator acceptance claim is made by this record.

Final product release requires operator UX/trust review with user-visible evidence that action status, connector mode, approval requirement, policy decisions, denial reasons, evidence/audit links, risks, and next steps are understandable and not misleading.
Final review should include screenshots or recording from the release-candidate operator surfaces.
redaction_note: No raw secrets, provider credentials, private keys, session cookies, bearer tokens, live provider payloads, production data, user recordings, or screenshots containing sensitive data are included. This record references local CLI/report/operator UX evidence only and requires final operator UX/trust review before final product release, VS3-P, real on-prem readiness, or human operator acceptance claim.
task_outcomes: Continuation accepted using current local CLI/report/operator UX evidence.
Final product release still requires users to understand action status.
Final product release still requires users to understand Connector/Action mode.
Final product release still requires users to understand approval requirement and risk policy.
Final product release still requires users to understand policy decisions and denial reasons.
Final product release still requires users to understand evidence/audit links, risks, and next steps without misleading guidance.
